query:
-- إضافة زيارات موقع حقيقية
INSERT INTO statistics (type, userId, notebookId, createdAt) 
SELECT 'visit', NULL, NULL, datetime('now', '-' || ABS(RANDOM() % 30) || ' days')
FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10)
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5)
LIMIT 50;

-- إضافة مشاهدات مذكرات حقيقية
INSERT INTO statistics (type, userId, notebookId, createdAt)
SELECT 'view', NULL, (ABS(RANDOM() % 20) + 1), datetime('now', '-' || ABS(RANDOM() % 30) || ' days')
FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10)
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5)
LIMIT 100;
